programme.desc: Filmed on location in northern Israel, this film examines several biblical events that occurred in and around Mt. Gilboa, Beit Shan, and the Jezreel and Harod Valleys.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Satan attempts to undermine us at every step in our Christian walk, but when we walk in the Spirit and allow Him to control our life, we wont succumb to temptation.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, over 20 years ago.

programme.title: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: With her no nonsense preaching Joyce Meyer shares practical teaching about living life as a Christian. In an encouraging and supportive way, hear real stories that will challenge you to be the best that you can be.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Exciting interviews, inspiring music, and encouraging messages filled with spiritual principles and practices to help people live lives of meaning.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Johannes Gutenberg - Weapon of Mass Distribution
programme.desc: In this episode, learn all about the life of Gutenberg and the development of his world-changing invention. For better or worse!

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: The long trek down the West Australian coastline begins. Endless beaches and fiery red sands match the sun setting sky. Nick discovers faith in the Pilbara and gets some sage-like advice from a spiritual father.

programme.title: Fragrance of Faith
programme.desc: Discover enterprising people in the most influential spheres of modern society: arts, entertainment, and business. From New York to Paris, we visit exclusive places that challenge our perceptions of the Holy Ground.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Skippy
programme.desc: Skippy and the gang face a new adventure at the Habitat.

programme.title: Road Games
programme.desc: A truck driver and a hitchhiker end up in a cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer on a desolate Australian highway.

programme.title: Teenage Kicks
programme.desc: After his brother's tragic death, 17-year old Miklos must deal with his fraying family and confront his complicated feelings for his best friend.

programme.title: Lonesome
programme.desc: A country boy leaves his Australian hometown after a scandal and begins a new life in Sydney, meeting a streetwise city boy struggling with his own traumas.

programme.title: Kane
programme.desc: Benny works for old school crime boss Abe, Abe has multiple personalities and is in a gang war with the notorious Frankie. Kane is the deadliest of Abe's personalities, the next 24 hours will be a killer. Today is a good day to die.

programme.title: The Emu War
programme.desc: Based on the infamous Great Emu War of 1932, a rag tag platoon of soldiers are driven into a brutal and bloody battle against Australia's deadliest flightless beasts.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Skippy
programme.desc: A balloon is at Habitat as a tourist attraction, the Hammonds have guests, Lou's friend Tamiko and a Japanese boy who is staying with Tamiko's family.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: The Bushveldt Carbineers, made up mainly of Australians, is ordered by the British to the fight the Boer on its terms.

programme.title: Breaker Morant: The Retrial

programme.title: Charge Of The Anzacs
programme.desc: In 1917 Australian Light Horse soldiers claimed one of the greatest ever cavalry charged victories in history. Some 95 years later, 40 Australians retraced their footsteps.

programme.title: Sirens
programme.desc: A repressed reverend falters when he tries to tame the wicked ways of an artist who does scandalous paintings of nude models.

programme.title: Australian Rules

programme.title: Shame
programme.desc: A lawyer travelling through the Australian outback stops in a small Western Australian town after her motorcycle breaks down. While there, she uncovers that the town has a terrible secret.

programme.title: Tim
programme.desc: A lonely, middle-aged woman develops a close relationship with a mentally-disabled young handyman after hiring him to look after her garden, and the townspeople begin to wonder if she is taking advantage of the young man's innocent nature.

programme.title: Occupation: Rainfall

programme.title: Skippy

programme.title: Skippy

programme.desc: Forrest visits Vantara to see efforts securing a future for rare species. He joins a cheetah feeding circle, meets newborn cubs, and follows a once orphaned sun bear called Prince, thriving, and is ready to take on the world.

programme.title: Saving Britain's Wildlife
programme.desc: The staff at East Winch Wildlife centre tackle the growing problem of seals trapped in discarded fishing nets. A swan has its foot caught in discarded rubble.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: Spanning over nine years and 100 episodes, this special episode with the cast and the crew of the program shows highlights from the best of Big Foot.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: The boys head to Greenland for an opportunity to fish an extremely remote river believed to hold massive Arctic char. While there, they discover its barren tundra, towering fjords and wilderness that is both pure and unforgiving.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: A tegu lizard with serious constipation needs surgery. Dr. Blue treats a boxer that can barely breathe and the vets help a baby alpaca in distress.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Dr Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team uncovers an underground fighting league after they discover the body of a retired boxer buried under concrete at a construction site.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behaviour that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Shane Casey is captured by police but soon escapes. He then leaves clues for the crime lab encrypted in dollar bills that suggest that Danny is his next target.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found in Central Park, drained of blood and missing part of her ear, the CSIs jump start an investigation that takes them into the dark and mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A Formula racing driver is seriously injured and later dies when his car explodes during an exhibition race.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team must unravel the series of events from a wild night for a group of friends, a night which ended in four dead bodies, and a fifth person wandering the streets covered in blood and wielding an axe.

programme.desc: The team discovers that a double homicide is related to an investigation by a pair of journalist bloggers into fraud by a company that makes gold bullion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed 'unsolvable' by the veterans. But has the ambitious young investigator bitten off more than he can chew?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: An army vet is found bleeding to death in a parking lot, his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Clues lead to an unlikely killer whose motive for murder is as heartless as it is confounding.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan examines the tragic case of police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone, who were murdered in 2012 by Dale Cregan.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Two girls were enjoying a night out in central Edinburgh. The following day, both their bodies were found dumped on waste ground; they had been battered and raped before being strangled to death.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: 16-year-old Diamond Bradley mystifies her family when she suddenly disappears, and detectives hope surveillance footage will lead them to the missing girl before it's too late, but the trail she leaves behind is more terrifying than anyo...

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: A neighbor finds the body of 40-year-old Dawn Meade outside an apartment complex in Louisa, Virginia, in 2017, and detectives must determine if this is an accidental death or not, so they turn to surveillance footage to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: A hardscrabble mining town in the middle of the picturesque Appalachian mountains. Iaeger's only physician, beloved Ebb "Doc" Whitley, was found burned to death in his home.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2005, David and Lorrie Donivan were found brutally stabbed to death. The investigation gave rise to a terrifying theory: the town was being stalked by one of its own.

programme.title: Murder At My Door
programme.desc: In one of the biggest investigations ever carried out by Tayside Police, evidence in the case of a pensioner's murder leads to a family friend. (3 of 4)

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women may appear to be sugar coated, but outside appearances can be deceiving; they are made of sugar and spite.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a security professional is found shot outside his home, police fear retaliation from someone at an event he worked that night; but rumors of an affair point them in a new direction, revealing disturbing lies and betrayal.

programme.title: The Basement: Vanishing In Apple Valley
programme.desc: When a mother, her two kids, and a friend vanish from a blood-soaked Ohio home, investigators trace a store receipt to suspect Matthew Hoffman. Are the victims still alive?

programme.title: The Basement: Vanishing In Apple Valley
programme.desc: 13-year-old Sarah is rescued from a terrifying basement, but three others remain missing. Investigators face a desperate race against time to break suspect Matthew Hoffman.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A car passenger runs from police while the driver pulls a disappearing act. A flashy driver almost escapes arrest until he states he's been drinking. A female driver can't hide her contraband.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A robber tries to hide from a K-9 unit. A driver attempts to convince officers that marijuana is harmless. A man runs from police after making an obscene inquiry.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A man caught urinating in public gets into a lengthy scuffle with police. A car thief claims a crack addict let him borrow his car. Police investigate a drunken bar fight. A couple seek help.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A criminal lectures officers on how the law works. A mother chastises her child after she is caught with drugs. A suicidal man claims he only wanted attention. A father takes the fall for his son.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators home in on the killer of a young woman after they discover a link with a murder that occurred elsewhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others, and she'd turn up a few days later. Soon, they realise this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police find a stray button at the crime scene of a brutal murder of a helpless woman. Does the button belong to her attacker?

programme.title: The Basement: Vanishing In Apple Valley
programme.desc: When a mother, her two kids, and a friend vanish from a blood-soaked Ohio home, investigators trace a store receipt to suspect Matthew Hoffman. Are the victims still alive?

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In Deltona, Yesenia Suarez and her children vanish after a fight with her jealous husband, Luis Toledo. Detectives suspect his jealousy may have led to their disappearance.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In 2018, Ezra McCandless claims her boyfriend, Alex Woodworth, attacked her. As a love triangle unravels, McCandless's inconsistent story leads detectives to suspect a fatal outcome.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: When Shirley Pierce's fiance finds her murdered in the bathtub, detectives investigate the ransacked house - but who harbours this much jealousy for Shirley?

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: When Daniel Bezemer suspected girlfriend Justine Vanderschoot of cheating, he lured her to a park-and-ride - before exacting his revenge.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: The rape and murder of an elderly woman leaves police scrambling. With no valuables taken and no signs of forced entry, investigators think it could be an inside job committed by a predator.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: Minnesota is a safe haven for its gay community until gunfire rips through two parks popular for cruising, leaving two men dead and one wounded. Police race to determine a connection between the cases.

programme.title: CI Australia: Most Infamous
programme.desc: Failing in his studies and dreaming of living a celebrity life, Sef Gonzales devised a plan to get his hands on his family's money, by murdering his mother, father and sister.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories
programme.desc: An extortionist going by the name Mr Brown claims to have put a bomb on a Qantas flight from Sydney to Hong Kong.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A wife and stepson are found dead in an apparent murder suicide. Forensic evidence reveals inconsistencies that point to the husband.

programme.title: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: A talented skateboarder is murdered in Liverpool. Missing a murder weapon and a motive, a Snapchat message where the killers brag about their plan helps the police crack the case.

programme.desc: When McGowan was bailed to Claire's home after yet another offence, the innocent woman became trapped in the orbit of a violent man.

programme.desc: Hogan agrees to take in two escapees, but finds himself with 20 men to outfit with uniforms and papers!

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A mysterious man involves Jessica in the defection of two European musicians and the murder of a British intelligence agent.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After 48 hours with little sleep, the 4077th is greatly fatigued, and the few hours of fitful sleep they can catch are filled with dreams of the war, revealing their fears and feelings of lack of fulfillment.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Aggie O'Shea, a famous war correspondent, arrives at the 4077th and is smitten with B.J. He soon fears that he is falling in love with her in return and he struggles to remain faithful. S08 Ep 23.

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain. Eric and Cyril fall out over a lost compass, and Mr Newbold gets soaked on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi.

programme.title: The Glenn Miller Story
programme.desc: Musical biopic of the bandleader and trombonist, depicting his triumphs both on and off the stage before his mysterious disappearance in 1944. With James Stewart and June Allyson

programme.title: Rachel Khoo: Little Paris Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel rustles up sticky chicken with a delicate lavender and lemon glaze. In the style of a true Parisian, Rachel take a trip to the seaside town Trouville, where a local fisherman treats her to succulent scallops.

programme.title: The Great American Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers made savory breadsticks, baked a traditional cob loaf for the technical, and designed a bread sculpture inspired by "The Twelve Days of Christmas" with multiple flavours.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge's Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom shares his step-by-step method for creating mouth-watering venison pies. For dessert, he makes a pear and chocolate frangipane tart served with Chantilly cream.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness visits a huge factory in north Wales that churns out an incredible 120 million boxes of breakfast cereal a year.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics
programme.desc: Jamie makes a splash foraging for the freshest seafood with South Korea's mermaids of the sea, and visits a Swiss family's treasured orchards to find out why an apple a day might just keep the doctor away.

programme.title: Jamie: Fast And Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road To Mexico
programme.desc: Rick starts his journey in San Francisco, tasting dishes like the hangtown fry - oyster pancake; a dish that can trace its origins to the California gold rush, which created the most famous Chinatown in the world.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick enjoys an autumnal culinary long weekend in his favourite French town of Bordeaux as he searches for food excellence and brilliant recipes in local restaurants and wineries.

programme.title: James Martin's Spanish Adventure
programme.desc: James visits Santiago De Compostela, where he explores the local market and visits a bakery to try Tarta de Santiago. He cooks a seafood stew, t-bone steak, empanadas and rice with mussels.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Holly Nicholson and chef Miguel Maestre explore Joali Maldives and Joali BEING, featuring overwater villas, a Turkish bathhouse, water sports, wellness treatments, and a semi-submarine ride.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's My Swedish Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel serves a grilled lobster with a cabbage and caraway salad. Then she makes her own gravlax poke bowl, and for desserts she prepares white chocolate berry coconut mountains.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics
programme.desc: Jamie makes a splash foraging for the freshest seafood with South Korea's mermaids of the sea, and visits a Swiss family's treasured orchards to find out why an apple a day might just keep the doctor away.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood's Pies And Puds
programme.desc: Paul joins cake decorator Adam Cox in creating a Pina Colada pudding topped with a miniature Paul Hollywood reclined under a palm tree. Out and about, Paul explores how pies bring flavours together like nothing else.

programme.title: James Martin's Home Comforts
programme.desc: Impressive dishes to wow your friends and family in no time at all. James shows us how by creating a zingy Lemon Posset and melt-in-your-mouth Beer Braised Beef Cheeks.

programme.desc: A pair of photographs are the only clues that Poirot has to solve the murder of a village charwoman, and to prove the innocence of the victim's lodger.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Jack Bell saves the day when the hospital's boiler dies; an explorer makes an interesting discovery while staying at the Royal.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Sybil's political aspirations land her in trouble. The question of the wine thief is brought to a head with a shocking revelation by Bates.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: DCI Vera Stanhope is reunited, under tragic circumstances, with her first ever Sergeant, Stuart Macken, when his house is petrol bombed, and he and his daughter are badly burned.

programme.title: The Frankenstein Chronicles
programme.desc: Marlott takes a terrified Pritty on their assignation to meet the men who kill for money. They find themselves in the tunnels under Smithfield market, which run from the Fortunes of War pub to St Bart's Hospital.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Five years earlier Dean Scott was found dead of shot-gun wounds and suicide was the verdict. Now ex-hooker Alice Hill tells the team she was at Dean's house at the time and believes he was murdered.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Gerry celebrates his birthday at a comedy club where a controversial act is heckled. Sandra learns the vocal heckler is the niece of a missing activist. The squad reinvestigates, uncovering ties to an extreme group connected to a murderer.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: A gambler takes over the running of a Las Vegas casino in the 1970s. His success is threatened by the arrival of an unstable old friend, now a powerful and ambitious mobster, an investigation by the FBI and his own wife's tortured past.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Superspook Jack Ryan gets political when an unconstitutional "war on drugs" fought with U.S. soldiers goes awry. Ryan uncovers the secret plan just as the troops are abandoned, and he realizes he's being set up to take the fall.

programme.title: Out Of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Jack Ryan, a retired CIA agent, is on vacation in England when he stops an assassination attempt on an important member of the Royal Family.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: Peaceful farmer Benjamin Martin is driven to lead the Colonial Militia during the American Revolution when a sadistic British officer murders his son.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: The Baywatch babe squeezes into a black leather outfit to become Barb Wire, a bar owner/mercenary, persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship in USA 2017.

programme.desc: Gordie and his best friend Vern overhear his older brother and a friend talking about their discovery of a dead body in the woods. Hoping they can get credit for finding the body, they go looking.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: When a sudden, disastrous explosion severely cripples the Apollo 13 spacecraft during its lunar mission, the astronauts aboard the vessel must overcome a series of catastrophes with the help of Mission Control if they hope to return to E...

programme.title: Planes, Trains And Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: When teenager Marty McFly is blasted to 1955 in the DeLorean time machine created by the eccentric Doc Brown, he finds himself mixed up in a time-shattering chain reaction that could vaporize his future-and leave him trapped in the past.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: A teenager and his girlfriend journey into the future to deal with their children, but things go awry when a scheming bully steals their time machine, transforming the time period they came from into a grim alternate reality.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Stranded in 1955, Marty McFly learns about the death of Doc Brown in 1885 and must travel back in time to save him. With no fuel readily available for the DeLorean, the two must figure how to escape the Old West

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Kevin Costner is the hero leading a peasant revolt against the evil Sheriff of Nottingham . Stirring adventure with Morgan Freeman. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Professor Sherman Klump begins to experience difficulties with his alter ego Buddy Love who is trying to destroy his relationship with his beautiful fiancee, so he tries to vanquish his troublesome dark side by altering his DNA structure.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: After a wealthy San Francisco banker is given an opportunity to participate in a mysteriously personalized game, his life is turned upside down as he begins to question if it might really be a concealed conspiracy to destroy him.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A US military lawyer defends two US marines charged with murdering a fellow marine at the Guantanamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: True account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.desc: An ex-con sprung from prison stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour.

programme.desc: While searching for Kramer in Los Angeles, Jerry and George are picked up for questioning by the police, who suspect Kramer is a notorious serial killer known as the smog stranger.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a suicide attempt by Jerry's neighbour lands him in a coma, Jerry begins a relationship with his hot girlfriend. George visits a psychic who predicts trouble on his upcoming trip to the Caymans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A new soup restaurant opens with soup that everyone loves. But the owner, dubbed 'the Soup Nazi', is eccentric and wants everyone to follow a strict ordering procedure.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George begins to think that the foundation suspects that George was the one that killed Susan. To find out for sure, George hides a tape recorder in a brief case and leaves it in a foundation meeting.

programme.desc: George meets an old friend who's spent the last few months undergoing chemotherapy that everyone knew except him while Kramer calls a litterbug a "pig" near a cop who's on a quest to catch a long-time parking ticket scofflaw.

programme.desc: Kramer and Newman scramble for a resolution when the landlord threatens eviction after discovering their reversed peepholes; George mocks Jerry for deciding to no longer carry a wallet in his pocket; Elaine hates Putty's new fur.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George seeks revenge on his boss after he quits and then tries to get his job back. Jerry and Kramer think a laundromat owner stole money from Jerry.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.sub-title: Mt. Fuji Erupts: Are We Prepared? Part 1
programme.desc: The eruption of Mt. Fuji could spew 490 million cubic meters of ash over a wide area, including Tokyo. CG and dramatization, based on the latest scientific research, highlight the potential risks.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Barakan Discovers
programme.desc: In 1843, after surviving a shipwreck, 16-year-old John Manjiro found himself in the US. He later played a key role in opening Japan's doors to the world. Peter Barakan visits Manjiro's hometown, Tosa.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: CYCLE AROUND JAPAN
programme.desc: On an early spring ride around the base of this extensive mountain range, we meet an artisan making traditional snowshoes, a family making salmon trout sushi, and villagers picking medicinal herbs.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: A five-minute series where you can explore a wide variety of Japanese cultures, traditions and lifestyles.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Design Hunting in Shiga. This central prefecture is home to Lake Biwa and rich water resources led to a unique regional culture. Our design hunt explores modern updates on tradition.

programme.title: u&i
programme.desc: This show for kids promotes a greater understanding for people with difficulties and helps develop empathy. With the help of two fairies, the main character thinks about what can be done to help.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: The proactive science education program which encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: MOUNT FUJI TRUTH
programme.desc: Mount Fuji is an icon of Japan. We explore how it attained its height and cone shape, where its water goes, and the story behind the Fujiko faith.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.sub-title: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: The seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport's techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.

programme.title: RAMEN JAPAN
programme.desc: All black soup! A one-of-a-kind bowl of ramen from the fertile rice lands of Toyama.

programme.sub-title: Hinoki Bark Thatching: The age-old skills for roofing
programme.desc: Discover the unique, traditional method of roof thatching that uses Hinoki cypress bark.

programme.sub-title: Explaining when there's been a misunderstanding
programme.desc: Today: explaining when there's been a misunderstanding. Bima Aji Nugroho, from Indonesia, works at a metalworking company in Saitama Prefecture. He worries about problems due to miscommunication.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Nearly everything the Sakamoto family eats they produce themselves, collecting local food waste to feed their pigs, and using solar power. A zero waste life cycle that also makes for a happy family.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN's flagship documentary series offers must-see episodes on politics, the economy, social trends, science and the environment in Japan and beyond.

programme.title: Century Signboards
programme.desc: An oasis in the heart of Tokyo with ties to the post-World War II US occupation, this restaurant has shaped Japanese food trends for over 100 years.

programme.title: The Perfect 2-Hours Guide
programme.desc: Enoshima, a popular tourist destination near Tokyo known for marine sports. It's also an island with spiritual depth and mystical natural scenery. Come along on an unforgettable two-hour journey.

programme.title: CYCLE AROUND JAPAN Highlights
programme.desc: We travel Okayama in spring, visiting unique places like a city famous for horseshoe crabs, an island with a historical stone quarry, and a temple featuring hundreds of woodblock prints.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.sub-title: Isn't It Strange for a Man to Like Pink?
programme.desc: Ozzy, a grown man, loves pink and uses lots of pink things. Mee feels puzzled about it, and a strange being named "Puzzlin" appears! Every time Mee meets Ozzy, the number of Puzzlins increases...

programme.title: Design Ah neo

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-11.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japan's population is aging, but "active seniors" energetically participate in work and hobbies. We meet a salesperson and a clockmaker who are both centenarians and learn the secrets to good health.

programme.sub-title: Sado Island: Pathways and Folk Songs

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A former police officer turned pimp begins searching for missing women who worked for him. He discovers they all visited the same client before disappearing, leading him into a dark and violent hunt.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: When a French policeman is forced to take a leave of absence, he returns to Japan, where he reunites with old friends and attempts to find the reason his estranged girlfriend abandoned him years ago, leading to the discovery of a hidden ...

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: A maniacal clown named Art, terrorizes three young women on Halloween night and everyone else who stands in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is repeatedly sexually abused, humiliated, and left for dead by four men whom she systematically hunts down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Cops Vs Thugs
programme.desc: Kenkei tai soshiki boryoku" is a gripping Japanese crime drama delving into the dark underworld of organized crime and the relentless pursuit of justice, with a web of secrets and betrayals at its core.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: House Of The Devil
programme.desc: Desperate for quick cash, college sophomore Samantha Hughes takes a babysitting job in the isolated mansion of the creepy Ulman family. Samantha has no idea that a nightmare of unspeakable fear and torment awaits her within these walls.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: A film crew is in the process of shooting a low budget zombie horror movie when they unexpectedly find themselves fighting for their lives when real zombies begin to attack, and they must try to work together in hopes of survival.

programme.title: Pusher 1
programme.desc: A failed drug deal leaves small-time criminal Frank owing money to a ruthless Copenhagen drug lord. As pressure mounts, he is pulled deeper into the city's brutal underworld. Mads Mikkelsen stars in Nicolas Winding Refns gritty crime thr...

programme.title: Pusher 2
programme.desc: Tonny has just been released from prison. He must now take care of the son he has found out he has while trying to win his father, a brutal gangster king, love.

programme.title: Pusher 3
programme.desc: This bloody and utterly captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest king pin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County
programme.desc: A traveling knife salesman finds himself stranded and forced to wait at an isolated rest stop. He soon realizes he has wandered into a violent hostage situation upon the arrival of two bank robbers who are on the run after a recent heist.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: Bruce Willis finds himself as the prey in this action thriller. A former police chief is hunted down to prevent him from delivering eyewitness testimony against a drug family.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Bride Of Re-Animator
programme.desc: A mad doctor and his accomplice return to the scene of a zombie massacre to continue their bodybuilding experiments.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: After 13 years in prison, the mad scientist from Re-Animator (1985) gets a new chance to experiment with the arrival of a young prison doctor, who secretly hopes to learn to reanimate dead people. Good intentions turn to horror.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller with Jeremy Northam and Lucy Liu. A man takes a job as an industrial spy without understanding the true nature of the role, nor its dangers. Violence/strong language.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier, living homeless in London, is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. As he starts to fall for her, he cannot ignore his suspicion that something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Quest For Fire
programme.desc: 80,000 years ago, human survival depended on fire. The Ulam tribe could use and protect it, but not create it. When their flame is accidentally extinguished, their way of life and survival are put at risk.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Hellraiser (1987)
programme.desc: A man opens a mysterious puzzle box and is taken to a hellish realm. After escaping and returning to his family home, he must rely on human blood to restore himself, forming a dangerous alliance with a family member.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: A horde of murderous crab monsters descend on a sleepy coastal town on Prom night, and only a ragtag group of outcasts can save the day.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship unfolds between a young deaf boy, Wesley, and a fugitive criminal who takes refuge in an abandoned barn on the familys rural North Dakota farm.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: Alejandro Jodorowsky is one of world cinema's most fabled iconoclasts. In 'The Holy Mountain', Jodorowsky plays The Alchemist, a guru who guides a troupe of pilgrims on a quest to ascend the Holy Mountain in search of spiritual enlighten...

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it. A survival story set in a living room.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: In London, a young writer studies the behavior of strangers, including a burglar, who discovers that he is being watched and invites him to tag along and participate in his criminal activities, and the scribe soon becomes enthralled.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: A man travels to a remote cabin to see his estranged father, but arrives just as his dad's shady past is returning to haunt him. Comedy-thriller starring Elijah Wood.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, the Vatican sends a team of priests to investigate, concerned about an ancient prophecy that a woman will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn
programme.desc: Based on the classic short story by Stephen King, CHILDREN OF THE CORN is a longtime horror favorite that has spawned six sequels and many imitations. See how it all started.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: After living a peaceful life of recluse in the middle of the forest, a unique family of sasquatches begins to encounter difficulties when they suddenly come face-to-face with the devastating reality of deforestation.

programme.title: God Is A Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped by a cult, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: A young woman travels to Las Vegas with the desire to be one of the biggest showgirls on the strip, and plans to stop at nothing to get there, but as she climbs to the top, she realizes that her friendships, morals and soul are on the line.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: In order to get out of the snobby clique that is destroying her good-girl reputation, an intelligent teen teams up with a dark sociopath in a plot to kill the cool kids.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural East Texas, where he murders people who upset him or his business, and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During transport, a group of hardened criminals stages a jailbreak that quickly escalates into a bloody, all-out riot. As the fugitives exact their brutal terror campaign onboard the ship, something even more terrifying emerges from below.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
programme.desc: Reports of ritual grave desecration and corpse theft draw five close friends into rural Texas to check on a grandfather's gravesite, and while on their way they pick up a crazed hitchhiker and encounter a family of murderous cannibals.

programme.desc: A former police officer turned pimp begins searching for missing women who worked for him. He discovers they all visited the same client before disappearing, leading him into a dark and violent hunt.
